roa.docketEntryComment: Advisement and Waiver - Waiver of Arraignment on Motion to Revoke
DA Notice of Motion and  Misdemeanor Motion to Revoke Probation

/CAL:SENTENCING/TWS/CH2:PROB 5 Y:PJ 120 D/CTS:1/X:THE BALANCE OF THE COUNTY JAIL SENTENCE SHALL BE SERVED ON HOME DETENTION,/X:AS A CONDITION OF PROBATION, DEFENDANT SHALL SERVE 120 DAYS ON HOME  DETENTION WITH MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE FOR HOMEDETENTION AND IS  ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTHON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON 09-04- 20, TO BE FITTED WITH THE GPS FOR HOME DETENTION/CTORD:AT THE TIME DEFENDANT IS FITTED WITH THE GPS FOR HOME  DETENTION, THE SFSD IS ORDERED TO DISCONTINUE AND REMOVE THE SCRAM DEVICE,/ /X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/PF525 18/MOP1/LREG/IID:2/LVAL/LCHEM/VF2:150/DEF:SHALL ENROLL IN AND COMPLETE 1 MADD VICTIM IMPACT CLASS/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 101 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS THOUGHFULLY SET FORTH HEREIN/DEF:ADMITS CONVICTION ON TWO PRIOR ALCOHOL RELATEDOFFENSES, FIRST, A CONVICTION UNDER VC 23103 WITHIN THE MEANING OF VC 23103,5, A WET RECKLESS, ON OR ABOUT 01-05-16 IN SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AND SECOND, A CONVICTION UNDER VC23152(B) ON OR ABOUT 09-26-16, IN SAN MATEO COUNTY//X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/DISM3/4019HALF/
/CAL:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/X:ORDER ALLOWING DEFENDANT TO TRAVEL TO LOS ANGELES FROM FEBRUARY 28 THRU MARCH 2, 2020 IS SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT,//CONT/SB:2 HR/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/X: ATTORNEY JAY BAIK APPEARS SPECIAL FOR ATTORNEY SAMARA/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/GTWM/X: MVARS PROTECTIVE ORDER FILED/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALLBE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A SCRAM DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDERIN FILE,/CONTD:PROOF OF SCRAM ON 10-24-19/DOP/CONTD: PRE-TRIAL CONFERENCE ON 12-03-19/SB: 2 HOURS WITH NO SCRAM VIOLATIONS/
/CAL:CHANGE OF PLEA/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OFNL/DEFT ADV NL:2/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/
/CAL:PRETRIAL/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS ALLOWED TO TRAVEL OUT OF STATE FROM DECEMBER 12, 2019 THROUGH DECEMBER 15, 2019,  SIGNED ORDER FILED/CONT/SB:2 HOUR
/CAL: PROOF OF SCRAM/X: PROOF OF SCRAM SHOWN/X: PRE-TRIAL CONFERENCE ON 12-03-19 IS CONFIRMED/SB: 2 HOURS WITH NO SCRAMVIOLATIONS/
